# X Twitter Scraper Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "x-twitter-scraper" {
  # Prefer X_TWITTER_SCRAPER_API_KEY or X_TWITTER_SCRAPER_BEARER_TOKEN.
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String)
- `base_url` (String) Set the base url that the provider connects to.
- `bearer_token` (String)
